name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups POST Blueberry Morning Cereal, slightly crushed
1 Cup Breyer's or Kneudson Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. MIX cereal, cinnamon and 2 tablespoons melted margarine in a small bowl; set aside.
3. IN another small bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder and salt.
4. IN a large bowl, beat the softened margarine with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. GRADUALLY add sugar, beating until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. STIR in vanilla extract.
7. ADD flour mixture alternately with sour cream, beating after each addition until smooth.
8. POUR half of the batter into a 9-inch square pan that has been sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
9. TOP with half of the cereal mixture.
10. REPEAT layers.
11. BAKE for 40 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. SERVE warm and cut into squares.
